name: Just Shut Up and Come with Us!!!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action is missing the required 'count' parameter to look at top 5 cards. The current filter only checks cost ≤3 but doesn't specify looking at exactly 5 cards from deck top.
SearchDeck filter is missing the type requirement for {Animal} type Character cards. Only the cost constraint is present.
SearchDeck action is missing the 'limit' parameter to enforce 'up to 1' card can be played (optional play).
The action doesn't specify that remaining cards should be placed at bottom of deck in any order. This is a mandatory part of the effect that affects game state.
